name: Companies
description: CRM companies/accounts mirrored into Personize with account intelligence, scoring, signals, workspace, and operation metadata.

properties.description: Canonical root company domain.
Legal or common company name.
Normalized industry or vertical.
Known or estimated employee count.
Normalized employee size band.
Primary business model inferred from website, CRM, and context.
CRM where this company/account originated.
Native CRM company/account identifier for writeback.
0-100 account fit score based on ICP guidelines and current account facts.
One-sentence explanation for the latest ICP fit score.
0-100 account priority score combining fit, intent, lifecycle, and recent signals.
One-sentence explanation for the latest account score.
Normalized account lifecycle stage across CRMs.
Observed signals: hiring surges, new funding, tech adoption, job postings, expansion.
Aggregate strength of all buying signals detected on this account.
Most recent meaningful company-level signal.
Recommended account-level next action.
Current account-state summary. Rewritten each cycle by whichever agent has the latest understanding. The 'start here' for any account-level engagement.

Chronological timeline of account-level events. Each entry: { author, type (observation|action|change|milestone|enrichment|signal|outreach|engagement|system), summary, details, timestamp }. Append-only.
Account-level observations, intel, and analysis. Each entry: { author, content, category (observation|analysis|idea|reference|question|enrichment|signal), timestamp }. Append-only.
Account-level choices with full reasoning — explainability layer. Each entry: { question, decision, reasoning, alternatives, confidence, autonomous, approvedBy, timestamp }. Append-only.
